title: L1: Extract buildContent helper to dedup index/batch content-switch
description: zeroentropy_index (index.ts:329-345) and zeroentropy_batch (509-523) have identical content-switch blocks mapping content_type+content+pages to the SDK content object. Extract a buildContent(content_type, content, pages?) helper to remove ~30 lines and eliminate divergence risk between single and batch indexing.

title: Fix zeroentropy_status: test mocks non-existent documents.status; real path is getInfo
description: The SDK exposes documents.getInfo (camelCase) with envelope { document: { index_status, last_updated } }. The unit test mocks documents.status (which does not exist), exercising a dead fallback branch while leaving the real getInfo path untested. Fix the test to mock getInfo with the real response envelope and verify normalizeIndexStatus handles not_indexed/indexed correctly.

title: Add integration tests for live API validation
description: Run integration tests against ZeroEntropy API to validate all examples work correctly. Requires ZEROENTROPY_API_KEY.

title: M1: Fix SDK method-probe order to camelCase-first
description: list_collections probes get_list (non-existent) before getList (the real SDK method) at index.ts:438-441. The inverted order implies snake_case is canonical (it is not). Reorder all defensive method probes to put the real camelCase method first (getList, getInfo) so the common path is hit immediately and types can be tightened.

title: Add link checking to CI workflow
description: Add lychee link checker to validate all documentation links

title: v1.1.4 codebase review remediation
description: Fix verified review findings from full zeroentropy-skill codebase review: plugin import/env retry hardening, endpoint-correct search params/output, destructive permission gates, schema validation, packaging/version/CI/release drift, and docs/examples corrections.
close_reason: Completed v1.1.4 codebase review remediation; quality gates and live smoke passed.

title: Docs, OpenSpec, changelog, and hygiene cleanup
description: TDD and implement archive stale OpenSpec changes, add Unreleased changelog section, update project CI docs, expand root gitignore, and correct outdated SDK/method references where needed.
close_reason: Docs/OpenSpec/changelog/hygiene cleanup complete: stale changes archived, Unreleased added, Forgejo/Woodpecker docs updated, gitignore expanded.

title: CI and release packaging hardening
description: TDD and implement full pytest coverage in CI, release build before packaging, include plugin/dist, version validation for plugin lock, Node version pinning, and release docs.
close_reason: CI and release hardening complete: full pytest in CI, plugin dist release packaging, lockfile version validation, Node 22 CI, tests green.

title: H2: Add real-Zod tests for .max() input limits
description: The @opencode-ai/plugin mock is a chainable no-op, so Zod .min/.max/.enum/.default are never executed in tests. The .max(128/100/500_000) input-size guards have zero coverage; a regression deleting a .max() would pass CI. Add a focused test file importing real zod that asserts representative schemas reject oversized/empty input (e.g. z.array(...).max(128).parse(129 items) throws). Do not un-mock the whole plugin.

title: Bump version to 1.1.0 across manifests
description: plugin/package.json, skill.json, and SKILL.md header all say 1.0.0 but v1.1.0 feature work (new tools, retry, tests) is committed. Bump all manifests to 1.1.0 for consistency.

title: H1: Use SDK APIConnectionError instanceof for transient detection
description: The ZeroEntropy SDK exports APIConnectionError and APIConnectionTimeoutError (status=undefined) which ARE the transient errors. The current TRANSIENT_MESSAGE_PATTERN regex is a fragile proxy: empirically, new Error('Configuration timed out waiting for user input') is wrongly retried. Replace primary detection with error instanceof APIConnectionError; keep TRANSIENT_NETWORK_CODES (by .code) as fallback for raw socket errors; tighten/drop the message regex (remove bare 'network' and 'timed? ?out').

title: Document all 9 tools in plugin/README.md and ignore .beads runtime artifacts
description: plugin/README.md only documents 4 of 9 tools (missing create/delete/list_collection, status, batch). Add the missing tool docs. Also ensure .beads runtime artifacts (beads.db-shm/wal, daemon.log/pid, bd.sock, daemon.lock) are gitignored.

title: Add TypeScript type checking to CI
description: Configure tsc --noEmit for TypeScript examples in CI pipeline

title: H1 plugin runtime and API-contract hardening
description: TDD + implementation for: missing API key import-time failure, invalid ZEROENTROPY_MAX_RETRIES, endpoint-specific search params (include_document_metadata, document_results, latency_mode), destructive delete permission gate, async index status, dimensions/k/top_n validation, and real schema tests.
close_reason: Completed v1.1.4 plugin runtime/API-contract hardening with TDD; plugin build/tests green.

title: M2: Narrow withRetry to known-transient errors only
description: withRetry treats ALL no-status errors as retryable (index.ts:59-64), so programmer errors (TypeError, Zod failures, malformed-response crashes) and non-transient failures (auth misconfig) get retried 5x with backoff, wasting ~15s and masking the real error. Narrow retryability to known-transient network codes (ECONNRESET, ETIMEDOUT, ECONNREFUSED, EAI_AGAIN, ENOTFOUND) plus 429/5xx. Non-network errors without an HTTP status should fail fast.

title: Improve error handling with retry logic and exponential backoff
description: Add robust error handling to all plugin tools: automatic retry with exponential backoff for 429/rate-limit errors, better error messages for 409 conflicts, network timeout handling, and graceful degradation.

title: H2 packaging version CI release alignment
description: TDD + implementation for: version drift to 1.1.4 across manifests/SKILL/lockfile, plugin lockfile for npm ci, deterministic Woodpecker CI, release version validation across all sources, complete release assets, and plugin dependency hygiene.
close_reason: Completed v1.1.4 packaging/version/CI/release alignment; deterministic installs and release validation added.

title: M1 docs examples schema corrections
description: TDD + implementation for: async polling in standalone index examples, OpenCode singular plugin config docs, remove fake Claude marketplace commands, split latency docs, metadata-filter numeric operator schema, and plugin-specific list-prefix normalization wording.
close_reason: Completed v1.1.4 docs/examples/schema corrections; root remediation tests green.

title: Add new plugin tools: collection management, status polling, batch ops
description: Extend plugin with additional tools: zeroentropy_collection (create/delete/list collections), zeroentropy_status (check document indexing status), zeroentropy_batch (batch index multiple documents). Update SKILL.md with new tool documentation.

title: Add Vitest test suite for OpenCode plugin
description: Create comprehensive test suite for the zeroentropy-opencode-plugin using Vitest. Test all 4 tools (search, embed, rerank, index) with mocked ZeroEntropy client. Include error handling tests and edge cases.

title: Activate zeroentropy-skill in Woodpecker CI (token expired)
description: Forgejo repo thekidneyexperts/zeroentropy-skill (forge_remote_id=41) created and .woodpecker.yml committed, but Woodpecker activation returned 401 'User not authorized' — the WP token at ~/.config/woodpecker/token on dev-vps appears expired. Refresh the token and POST /api/repos?forge_remote_id=41 to enable CI.
close_reason: Woodpecker CI verified working. Root cause: Forgejo REQUIRE_SIGNIN_VIEW=true forced auth on public repos, but Woodpecker only injects netrc for private repos. Fixed by setting Forgejo mirror private. Pipelines #5 and #6 both green (clone+validate-skill+test-plugin).

title: Plugin safety and validation hardening
description: TDD and implement abort-aware retry, mutation retry safety, non-empty embed/page validation, strict metadata validation, and permission denial coverage.
close_reason: Plugin safety and validation hardening complete: abort-aware retries, mutation-safe semantics, strict metadata/pages/embed validation, permission-denial coverage, tests green.

title: M-a: Scope/drop getErrorStatus message-regex fallback
description: getErrorStatus message-regex /\\b(4\\d{2}|5\\d{2})\\b/ can mis-extract a status from text like 'search returned 404 results'. Since the SDK always sets .status on APIError, drop the message-regex fallback or scope it to a leading code pattern (e.g. ^\\s*(\\d{3})) to avoid matching arbitrary numbers in error detail.

title: v1.1.5 codebase review remediation
description: Remediate full-project review findings after v1.1.4: CI regression coverage, release packaging, cancellation-safe plugin retries, mutation retry semantics, stricter input/metadata validation, release tagging docs, OpenSpec hygiene, changelog, and root ignore hygiene.
close_reason: v1.1.5 review hardening delivered, verified, and locally deployed.

title: Add pages support to zeroentropy_batch for text-pages content
description: zeroentropy_index honors a pages[] field for text-pages content, but zeroentropy_batch always wraps as pages:[content] with no pages field in its schema. Add optional pages[] to batch document schema for capability parity.

title: Initial release: ZeroEntropy Agent Skill v1.0.0
description: Create universal AI agent skill for ZeroEntropy (zembed-1, zerank-2, zsearch) with recipes, examples, tests, and CI/CD

title: Remove dropped overwrite parameter from zeroentropy_index schema
description: zeroentropy_index declares an overwrite boolean arg but documentAddParams never forwards it (live API does not support overwrite). Remove the misleading schema field and update getErrorSuggestion 409 text which still references 'use overwrite where available'.
